caption:
Most creators waste more time switching apps than actually creating content. That’s not a workflow — that’s context-switching hell.
Claude Code just turned my terminal into a fully automated creative studio. Here’s the exact system.
Fal.ai generates your visuals using the latest AI models and turns them into video clips. Remotion takes every asset, adds animated captions, and exports a finished video — you never open an editing app.
Notion MCP pushes the full project automatically — script, assets, status, all tracked.
No more switching apps. No more manual editing. One system runs your entire creative production.
The bottleneck isn’t creativity. It’s the fragmented workflow between 15 different tools. This eliminates that entire layer.
You write the creative brief. Claude Code orchestrates Fal.ai for generation, Remotion for editing, Notion for project tracking. Everything automated from terminal to finished video.
This is what AI agents for creators actually means. Not replacing creative decisions — removing technical friction.
Comment STACK 👇 to get my full Claude Code guide for AI creators — Fal.ai integration, Remotion setup, Notion MCP workflow, and the exact automation that turns your terminal into a production studio.
Hashtags: #ai #contentcreation #automation #videoediting #claudecode
author: Ohneis - Andries Ohneisser

title: Claude Code Automates Your Entire Content Pipeline
one_liner: Claude Code orchestrates Fal.ai, Remotion, and Notion MCP to automate video creation from a single terminal.
key_points: Fal.ai generates visuals and converts them into video clips using the latest AI models
Remotion adds animated captions and exports finished videos — no editing app needed
Notion MCP auto-tracks scripts, assets, and project status throughout production
Claude Code acts as the orchestration layer, eliminating context-switching across 15+ tools
